business_ideas.idea: Remix framework - take existing products and remix with identity, lifestyle, science-back, premium differentiators
Woke roast coffee - identity-based coffee for progressive customers
Bubbles for bottoms - kombucha designed for LGBT community
Organic condoms - premium natural materials condoms
AI content authentication - blockchain watermarking to verify real vs deepfake video content

predictions.text: Happiness with wealth continues increasing up to at least $50 million net worth based on study data
Identity-aligned products increase willingness to pay by 20-40% vs generic alternatives
Freedom-inducing purchases (assistants, jets) drive more happiness than status symbols
Most businesses change pricing every 3 years but should change something every 3 months for growth
